name: Default devcontainer for testing lifecycle commands
initializeCommand: (ls /; ls /code || echo 'ERROR: ls / or ls /code failed') >> /devcontainer_lifecycle_initialize_command.txt
onCreateCommand: (ls /; ls /code || echo 'ERROR: ls / or ls /code failed') >> /devcontainer_lifecycle_on_create_command.txt
updateContentCommand: (ls /; ls /code || echo 'ERROR: ls / or ls /code failed') >> /devcontainer_lifecycle_update_content_command.txt
postCreateCommand: (ls /; ls /code || echo 'ERROR: ls / or ls /code failed') >> /devcontainer_lifecycle_post_create_command.txt
